zh: EC7 经典系列的全面进化版，A CLASSIC REIMAGINED
标配 WX-Σ (Sigma) 低偏转前节，12.5mm
XJ Powerplate 前节端面技术
United Joint 接牙系统，传导性极佳
en: Full evolution of the classic EC7 — A CLASSIC REIMAGINED
United Joint system for superior energy transfer

suitable_for.zh: 追求日本精工品质的中高级玩家。喜欢传统木质手感但又想要现代低偏转性能的选手。EC9 是 Mezz 品牌价值观最完整的体现。
suitable_for.en: Intermediate to advanced players who value Japanese precision craftsmanship. For those who love traditional wood feel but want modern low-deflection performance. EC9 is the purest expression of Mezz's brand philosophy.

review.zh: EC9 是 Mezz 的旗舰打杆系列，继承了经典 EC7 的设计语言并全面升级。最大亮点是标配的 WX-Σ 前节——Mezz 自研的低偏转木质前节技术，在保持木头手感的同时大幅降低偏转值。与 Predator REVO 这类碳纤维前节不同，WX-Σ 保留了传统木杆的触球反馈，适合不喜欢碳纤维'硬'感的选手。United Joint 接牙的传导性也是业界顶级。后把的珍贵木材镶嵌工艺体现了日本制造的精细——白色点缀、双缝银环、几何对称图案，每一处细节都经过精心设计。
review.en: EC9 is Mezz's flagship playing cue line, inheriting the classic EC7 design language with comprehensive upgrades. The standout feature is the included WX-Σ shaft — Mezz's proprietary low-deflection wood shaft technology that dramatically reduces deflection while maintaining traditional wood feel. Unlike carbon fiber shafts like Predator's REVO, the WX-Σ preserves traditional ball-striking feedback, suited for players who dislike carbon's 'hard' sensation. The United Joint's energy transfer is also industry-leading. The exotic wood inlay craftsmanship reflects Japanese precision — white accents, double-stitched silver rings, geometrically symmetric patterns, every detail meticulously designed.
